overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing nighttime driving through a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. The vehicle navigates commercial intersections, concrete tunnels, and elevated highways while passing towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and dense neon signage.

events.description: passing through intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: navigating through commercial intersections, stopping at crosswalks and turning corners

entered.detail: tall vertical billboard with samurai imagery and red neon accents
modern glass facade building with illuminated windows
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
elevated highway overpass crossing above the street
tall pole with multiple floodlights illuminating the intersection

segments.scene_description: Driving through a neon-lit commercial district with towering billboards and glass office buildings. The vehicle navigates intersections with traffic lights and crosswalks while passing under elevated highway structures.

events.description: entering concrete tunnel under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the dimly lit concrete tunnel

entered.detail: rough concrete wall of the underpass tunnel
rough concrete wall of the underpass tunnel
overhead fluorescent lights lining the tunnel ceiling
bright light visible at the far end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow concrete tunnel beneath the highway overpass. Artificial lighting replaces the neon glow of the city as the car drives through the enclosed underpass toward the bright exit ahead.

events.description: exiting tunnel into bright neon-lit avenue with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: speeding along the multi-lane highway past towering holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: silver car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: large blue holographic projection of a butterfly or fish-like creature
curved on-ramp structure with yellow safety barriers
tall modern building with reflective glass windows
illuminated sign reading '84 STORE' in blue and white

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into a wide neon-lit highway, the vehicle accelerates past massive holographic advertisements and glass skyscrapers. A silver car drives ahead in the distance as the road curves through the elevated urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown urban canyon with heavy neon signage

events.description: approaching and following traffic ahead through dense downtown
navigating through tighter urban canyon streets with reduced speed

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through dense downtown traffic and narrow urban canyons

notable_agents.action: white sedan ahead braking at intersections, guiding the path through traffic

entered.detail: concentrated array of multiple overlapping neon signs and advertisements
large green holographic projection of a face on building facade
dense cluster of high-rise commercial buildings
ground floor storefronts with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense downtown urban canyon where towering buildings block the sky and neon signs cover every surface. Following a white sedan through moderate traffic, the car navigates the narrow streets lined with street-level shops and massive holographic advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle moves from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district into the stark enclosure of a concrete tunnel. It begins by navigating busy intersections surrounded by towering glass office buildings and massive holographic billboards under the shadow of elevated highway structures. As the vehicle progresses, the expansive city skyline and colorful signage begin to recede, giving way to the narrowing walls of an underpass. The scene then shifts from the multicolored glow of the metropolis to the rhythmic artificial lighting of a concrete tunnel, driving forward toward a bright exit that looms ahead.

The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from an expansive, open highway into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-drenched urban canyon. It begins as the vehicle emerges from a tunnel onto a wide elevated road, accelerating past massive holographic advertisements and glass skyscrapers while trailing a distant silver car. As the road curves through the cityscape, the open horizon gradually narrows, shifting the perspective from the airy heights of the highway toward the dense core of the metropolis. The scene then tightens as the vehicle enters a corridor of towering buildings that block out the sky, following a white sedan through moderate traffic. Finally, the environment transforms into a crowded street-level landscape where neon signs cover every surface and holographic displays loom over narrow lanes lined with shops.
